# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant the account 'roles/owner' at project level so it can manage all GCP resources without permission errors. This enables full automation of our infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: cicd-service-account
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMember
  properties:
    resource: $(env[project])
    role: roles/owner
    member: serviceAccount:cicd-service-account@$(env[project]).iam.gserviceaccount.com

- name: cicd-service-account-key
  type: gcp-types/iam-v1:projects.serviceAccounts.keys
  properties:
    name: projects/$(env[project])/serviceAccounts/cicd-service-account@$(env[project]).iam.gserviceaccount.com
    privateKeyType: TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE
    keyAlgorithm: KEY_ALG_RSA_2048
